description_long: This treadmill features a robust rectangular running deck with a black surface and the brand name 'MATRIX' prominently displayed. The deck is bordered by a sturdy frame, with two parallel handrails extending from the front console to the rear for user support. The front console is angled and houses a control panel with visible buttons and a display screen, as well as a white and black color scheme with the 'MATRIX' logo on the side. The treadmill's side panels are accented with orange and gray, and the words 'ULTIMATE DECK' are printed on the side of the running surface. The overall construction appears to be a combination of metal and plastic, designed for durability and stability in high-traffic urban environments such as gyms, parks, or community centers. The treadmill sits on a solid base, slightly elevated from the ground, and does not appear to have wheels for easy movement.
description: A modern, sturdy treadmill with a black running deck, angled control console, and parallel handrails, featuring 'MATRIX' branding and orange side accents. The design is robust and suitable for urban fitness settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide running deck, parallel handrails, and the base of the control console.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled console, 'MATRIX' branding, and 'ULTIMATE DECK' label on the running surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the running belt, orange side accent, and the back of the handrails.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the control panel, handrails, and the treadmill's structural frame.
attribute_control_panel: The control panel is located at the front of the treadmill, integrated into the angled console. It features several visible buttons and a central display screen, with possible emergency stop and speed/incline controls, all within easy reach of the user.
attribute_running_belt: The running belt is wide and long, with a black textured surface and the 'MATRIX' logo printed on it. It is bordered by orange and gray side panels and appears to have a cushioned, non-slip texture for safe running.
attribute_handrails: The handrails are straight, parallel bars extending from the front console to the rear, positioned at a comfortable height for gripping. They are continuous and appear to be made of metal or coated plastic, without visible padding.
attribute_display_screen: The display screen is centrally located on the control panel, rectangular in shape, and appears to be digital. It is surrounded by physical buttons and is likely used for displaying workout information.
attribute_power_cord: No power cord is visible in the provided images, so its location, length, and attachment cannot be determined.
